abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: One Foot in the Grave
abilities.text: When this model declares the Walk action, it may remove a Remains marker within 1". If it does so, it may treat the Walk action as a (r).

abilities.name: Trail of Embers
abilities.text: After resolving an action that targeted and damaged this model, the attacking model gains a Burning token.

actions.name: Scorching Embers
actions.effects: Deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Critical Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Mass Hysteria
triggers.text: Move models damaged by this action up to 3".

actions.name: Carry the Flame
actions.effects: Move the target up to 2", then make a Remains or Inferno marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Dispose of Evidence
actions.effects: Remove target enemy marker. Draw a card.
